name: Smooth and Spicy Boursin Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and cream cheese together by hand.
2. Blend in the garlic until almost smooth.
3. Add the onion and Italian seasoning, mixing well.
4. Blend in the milk until incorporated.
5. Blend in the walnuts until thoroughly mixed.
6. Serve at room temperature. Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested dippers: Apples, Lavash Crackers, Potato Chips, Broccoli, Cocktail Rye Bread, Dried Fruit
